wordplay_note: A name suggesting divine order in a disordered world
card_description: Mary Anne Dominic (meaning "Dominic = of the Lord") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Flow My Tears the Policeman Said*. Ceramics student and lover of Taverner who tries to help him. Name note: A name suggesting divine order in a disordered world. Her ordinary decency contrasts with the regime's institutional cruelty. First appears in *Flow My Tears the Policeman Said*.
first_work: Flow My Tears the Policeman Said
